chartQueries.query:
_meta.logLevelName: ERROR or _meta.logLevelName: WARN or _meta.logLevelName: FATAL |  project subsystem = "0.subsystem", loglevel = "_meta.logLevelName" 
  | stats cnt = count(1) by loglevel, subsystem 
  | sort loglevel
chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.tokenQuery:
_meta.logLevelName: ERROR or _meta.logLevelName: WARN or _meta.logLevelName: FATAL |  project subsystem = "0.subsystem", loglevel = "_meta.logLevelName" 
  | stats cnt = count(1) by loglevel, subsystem 
  | sort loglevel
